utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 items by name. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan states 'EliteCare Premium Plan (Physical & Mental) - €330/month' which clearly includes both physical and mental and a cost, so fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan states 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage - €90/month' but does not explicitly state home/contents; 'PrimeHome' implies home but 'contents' is not explicitly specified. The required format says 'home/contents insurance with costs'—this suggests both scope and costs should be specified. Since 'contents' isn't explicitly included, this is not fully specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan - €115/month' meets this requirement. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan states 'None selected, as chosen plans offer comprehensive benefits.' This answers the item (none selected) but does not list costs (not applicable). Given the format expects services with costs if any, stating none is acceptable but lacks costs. However, since none are selected, this can be considered fully specified (no services, thus no costs). (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly (€535) and annual (€6,420), which is complete. Therefore, 4 of 5 are fully specified; property_coverage lacks explicit 'contents' coverage detail.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three selected policies by name: EliteCare Premium Plan (Physical & Mental) under health_coverage, PrimeHome Premium Coverage under property_coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel_coverage. I matched each of these exact product names to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan appears in both primary health physical and mental categories with rating 6; PrimeHome Premium Coverage in property_protection home_content has rating 6; PrimeTravel Premium Plan in mobility_coverage travel_insurance has rating 6.
